sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111258" key="filokudh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-κῡδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n111258.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving glory, glorious,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἥβη, κῶμος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:375" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">375</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:481" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">481</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
